urdu transliteration text:
Qasim teri qurbani pay, Rab ki raza roti rahi
Teri Yaeemi dekh kar, khaake shifa roti rahi
Qasim’s Sacrifice
english translation text: Qasim on your sacrifice,  The Lord’ cried in pleasureLooking at you being an orphan, the sand of Karbala cried

urdu transliteration text:
Tukde huwa lasha tera, Qasim yateem-e-Mujtaba
Matam kiya Saadat ne, Karb-o-bala roti rahi
english translation text: In pieces your body lay, Qasim the Orphan of MujtabaThe Sayyeds mourned, Karbala Cried

urdu transliteration text:
Ro ro ke karti thi fughaan, Mara gaya Qasim jawan
Karbobala ke dasht mai, Maa ki sada roti rahi
english translation text: She mourned and called out, Qasim has been slainOn the plains of Karbala his mother cried

urdu transliteration text:
Ghore se jab Qasim gira, Takseem jab laasha huwa
Khaimon me thaa maatam bapa, Aale aba roti rahi
english translation text: When Qasim fell from his horse, his body was trampledThere was mourning in the tents, the family of the cloak cried

urdu transliteration text:
Farwa ke dil me aas thi, Dekhungi Qasim ki khushi
Ghatri mai lasha dekh kar, Ma ki Dua roti rahi
english translation text: Bibi Farwa had hopes of seeing Qasim happyWhen she saw the pieces of his body, those hopes were lost

urdu transliteration text:
Larzi zameen kampa falak, Qasim huwa paamal jab
Jawwad Sir ko peet kar, Ranme qaza roti rahi
english translation text: The earth trembled, the sky shook when Qasim was trampled uponJawwad (poet) beating its head, cried at this boys fate
